title: Ubiquiti UACC-CKG2-Plus Stand - Stand for Cloud Key G2 Plus
category: Ubiquiti UACC-CKG2-Plus Stand - Stand for Cloud Key G2 Plus
description: The elegant aluminum stand with non-slip feet is only for the Cloud Key G2 Plus from Ubiquiti, which will hold the controller in an upright position . The dimensions of the base are 134 x 72 mm
